title: chionanthus macrobotrys
intro: Chionanthus macrobotrys, also known as the Chinese parasol tree or Chinese parasol, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Chionanthus macrobotrys include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
